candidate_definition_hints.text: 🌕 [ICCV 2021] Multitask AET with Orthogonal Tangent Regularity for Dark Object Detection. A self-supervised learning way for low-light image object detection.

Dark environment becomes a challenge for computer vision algorithms owing to insufficient photons and undesirable noise. To enhance object detection in a dark environment, we propose a novel multitask auto encod- ing transformation (MAET) model which is able to explore the intri…
